dateline: Hawthorne, CA / Boca Chica, TX — May 2002–Present
heroHeadline: SpaceX Achieves 600th Booster Landing — 48 Launches in 2026; IFT-12 Vehicles Cleared for Stacking
heroSubtitle: 8,750 days of reusability milestones — B1097 delivered Starlink 17-22's 25 satellites Apr 19 and landed on OCISLY for the 600th Falcon booster recovery in history (10 years 4 months since first landing Dec 2015); 48 orbital launches in 2026; Booster 19 + Ship 39 cleared all static fire milestones Apr 15-16, IFT-12 targeting May 2026; SpaceX accelerated employee IPO vesting ahead of planned June 2026 Nasdaq debut
footerNote: Data sourced from SpaceX.com, FAA, NASA, SpaceNews, NASASpaceflight.com, Spaceflight Now, Teslarati, TeslaOracle, CNBC, Bloomberg, TechCrunch, TIME, Space.com, Northrop Grumman
